name: porringer
documentation: # Porringer

modules.name: porringer.test.pytest
documentation:
Pytest utilities for Porringer tests.

This package provides shared fixtures, test data, and base test classes for testing Porringer plugins and environments.

documentation: Implementation of tests that should be overridden in plugins

documentation:
Verifies that the group name is the same as the plugin type

Args:
    plugin_type: The type to register
Base class for all environment integration tests that test plugin agnostic behavior

classes.name: porringer.test.pytest.tests.EnvironmentUnitTests
documentation:
Base class for all environment unit tests that test plugin agnostic behavior

Custom implementations of the environment class should inherit from this class for its tests.

modules.name: porringer.test.mock
documentation:
Mock package for Porringer tests.

This package contains mock implementations and utilities for testing Porringer plugins and environments.

modules.name: porringer.plugin.pipx
documentation:
Pipx plugin package for Porringer.

This package contains the implementation of the Pipx environment plugin,
providing functionalities for installing, uninstalling, upgrading, and searching packages.

Pip plugin package for Porringer.

This package contains the implementation of the Pip environment plugin,

modules.name: porringer
documentation:
Porringer package.

This package provides the core functionality for the Porringer application,
including API definitions, backend processing, console commands, and utility functions.

modules.name: porringer.console
documentation:
Console package for Porringer.

This package contains modules and utilities for the command-line interface,
including command definitions and configuration management.

modules.name: porringer.utility
documentation:
Utility package for Porringer.

This package contains utility functions and classes used throughout the Porringer application,
including subprocess management, type handling, and exception definitions.

modules.name: porringer.utility.subprocess
documentation: Subprocess definitions

functions.name: porringer.utility.subprocess.call
documentation:
Executes a subprocess call with logger and utility attachments. Captures STDOUT and STDERR

Args:
    arguments: Arguments to pass to Popen
    logger: The logger to log the process pipes to
    log_level: The level to log to. Defaults to logging.WARNING.
    suppress: Mutes logging output. Defaults to False.
    kwargs: Keyword arguments to pass to subprocess.Popen

Raises:
    ProcessError: If the underlying process fails

modules.name: porringer.core
documentation:
Core package for Porringer.

This package contains the core schemas and base classes used throughout the Porringer application,
including plugin definitions and shared data models.
